steps.title: Write the new group amounts
steps.content: An increase of $48\%$ makes the advanced-swimmer count $1.48a$. An increase of $36\%$ makes the intermediate-swimmer count $1.36b$.

steps.title: Write the new total
steps.content: The total began at $40$ swimmers and increased by $42\%$, so the new total is $40(1.42)$.

steps.title: Match the total equation
steps.content:
The two new group amounts must add to the new total:
$$1.48a+1.36b=40(1.42)$$
The answer is C.
